_about: Display look-up tables as DICOM SIGMOID VOI LUT functions. For a normalized input display tone x in [0,1]: out = 1 / (1 + exp(-4*(x - center)/width)). This is the DICOM PS3.3 C.11.2.1.3.1 SIGMOID VOI LUT Function (Equation C.11-1) with the window centre/width re-expressed in normalized tone space. width < 1 steepens contrast (short latitude, e.g. bone/extremity); width > 1 flattens it (long latitude, e.g. chest). Brightness shifts the centre, contrast scales the width at display time.
_reference: DICOM PS3.3 C.11.2.1.3.1 SIGMOID VOI LUT Function; per-anatomy gradation follows typical CR/DR body-part processing (steep for extremities, wide latitude for chest).
